## Scoring Key

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| ✅ | Implemented and matches wiki exactly |
| ⚠️ | Implemented but off by acceptable tolerance |
| ❌ | Missing or wrong beyond tolerance |
| 🔲 | Not yet tested |
| N/A | Not applicable to this revision |
